title: Chapter 10
content:
Chapter 10: Chapter 10: You Can Score If You Do Things Right!

"Ohh... then I won’t reject such an offer. Now, open your mouth and say ’ahh’~" Arielle scooped a spoonful of food, then she slowly made it fly like an airplane... truly the work of a MILF feeding her son.

’Ohoho! How could she make that so erotic!’ Owen roared internally. What Arielle did was way beyond his expectations.

He had only thought it would be a simple feeding, but it turned out to be the greatest spoon-feeding he had ever received in his entire life.

Never in his wildest dreams did he think he would get such a soul-dropping "airplane spoon-feeding" that usually only happens to a toddler.

"Ahh..." He opened his mouth like a child. As the spoon entered his mouth, he couldn’t think straight anymore.

(I know it’s weird, guys, but that’s life... you never know what might happen in your life.)

The combination of her superb cooking and her way of feeding him was absolutely peerless, unmatched, and unrivaled!

"Oh my, oh my... you are really cute, my dear Owen~" She was thoroughly satisfied that Owen liked her spoon-feeding.

Seeing her son with such an expression completely melted her heart, like a rock melting into a pool of magma deep within a volcano.

"Hehe... thank you, Mom. You really are the best," Owen spoke as he received another mouthful.

He couldn’t control his hands anymore as he fondled her ass cheeks without thinking of the consequences... well, those consequences wouldn’t matter since Arielle’s reaction was enough to make him smile wickedly.

Arielle squirmed as his hands dug deeper into her flesh, yet she decided to keep doing the feeding session anyway.

Her motherly ego refused to buckle; she was determined to finish everything she started.

The burning sensation already inside her rose to a completely new level, resulting in a sudden wetness... it continued to flow uncontrollably, leaving her panties soaked from her own wild imagination.

She even had half a mind to spread her legs, not caring that he was her son. Unfortunately, that would always remain a fleeting thought and nothing more.

"Hehe... now let me teach you about the ass, Mom~" Owen whispered into her ear, sending a jolt through her entire body.

Arielle hadn’t expected her attention to get completely swept away by his teasing... she even gulped hard, making Owen smile.

’A pent-up MILF for sure... acting so dignified when you are reacting like that. Not bad at all.’ Owen didn’t care about the mother and son roleplay.

He was adamant about reaping what he sowed... they weren’t blood-related, anyway! Owen believed in the infamous saying...

If there’s a hole, then there’s absolutely a goal!

Mom or not, Owen would claim the rewards of his hard-fought, labored work.

Still playing along wasn’t bad, and he wanted to keep doing things as they were.

"Oh my... then what is the difference between hips and an ass, Teacher Owen~?"

She leaned her body closer and whispered back to him, her tits pressing right against his chest, which made him strike a triumphant posture internally.

’Ahh... the softness, I’m about to die.’ Owen closed his eyes for a brief moment as he slowly drifted off into a world of tits... she wasn’t holding back at all while acting as his mother.

The way she behaved felt like pure seduction at some point... was it even possible for a family member to do such things?!

"You are bold for a student who wants to learn bad things, student Arielle~" Owen shamelessly spoke her name out loud. It was just acting, so it wasn’t a crime, right?...right?!

"Oh..." Her mind stopped functioning... a total power shutdown after hearing what Owen had just said.

"What a bad student, not even listening to the teacher who is speaking right in front of you!" Owen squeezed her ass, his fingers completely sinking into her flesh, even reaching her sensitive parts, which made her pray internally.

She refused to let her son know that she was already dripping wet after Owen’s teasing.

’How can a motherly figure savor my hands like this... she actually likes being touched by her son.’ Owen couldn’t fathom the sheer craziness of how Arielle was acting, escalating from a simple meal to a complete, lewd touching session.

Owen then recalled his skills... his Golden Fingers. It was said that a MILF would willingly accept his touch as long as her affection level was high, while his Smooth Talker skill worked like magic, too.

The more Owen teased, the easier it was for a MILF to be tamed... to make it simple and easy to understand.

Owen just needed to keep touching and saying lewd things to the MILF and things would play accordingly to the gods plan.

The MILF Tamer skill was the most straightforward of them all, since it allowed him to tame any MILF, even if she was a complete stranger.

Still, he needed to work harder to develop her deep affection toward him... a slow, deliberate pace mixed with some bold acts to smooth everything over.

That was why Golden Fingers and Smooth Talker made the absolute best combination, and it was the exact reason why Arielle didn’t care about his lewd touching; her affection was already high enough.

Currently, Owen only knew about her Family Affection... still, that alone proved that the level of affection between Arielle and Owen was immense.

He would just ask the system about her overall level of affection after he finished navigating his current, ecstatic predicament!

Ding!

[Evaluating the Host performance...ding...ding...ding..]

[SS Host Performance!]

[ Rewards: MILF Token 2 / 32 Exp Points Gained!]

[Arielle Affection Went Up, the feeding session made her recalled the best moments of her life as a mother]

[ Arielle - Family: 55/100]

[ Note: You can score if you do things right! (⁠◍⁠•⁠ᴗ⁠•⁠◍⁠) ]

Owen read through the written text hovering in front of him.

The completion of the quest signified that he was safe from being a complete loser...a tiny wiener holder.

If that happens...Owen will choose to end his life..than be a complete Eunuch!
